title: Acatar
description: Mod created by Phax709 that improves the basic content of Minecraft by adding new biome, ore and blocks, this mod is more based on exploration with plants and trees different from what Minecraft offers.
body:
This mod was created by a player named Phax709.
Its goal is to make it easier to obtain certain Minecraft items (for example, armor trims) and to add new crafting recipes that let players get them faster (such as a craftable Elytra).
Finally, the mod also aims to add new blocks, tools, armors, etc., that players can normally obtain in vanilla Minecraft — for example, concrete stairs and slabs.

Some additions include:

Phorist Brick (red brick)

Azure Crystal Brick (blue brick)

Camanite Blocks, resistant like bedrock

Fluorescent Mushroom, which gives nausea and poison effects

Armor that allows you to fly (very handy for the End)

Concrete stairs and slabs in all colors

Sculk Bricks inspired by Brandcraft’s “Blockus” mod (credited on each block for their design)

An Eye that lets you see nearby entities

A Pearl that summons three phantoms and removes unwanted status effects
